result.stdout:
Usage: reloadify <Project> [OPTIONS] 

Options:
  -p, --Platform=VALUE       Platform (AnyCPU, iPhone, iPhoneSimulator)
  -t, --target=VALUE         TargetFramework (net7.0-ios,net7.0-android,net7.0-
                               maccatalyst)
  -c, --configuration=VALUE  Configuration (Debug, Release)
  -f, --folder=VALUE         Root folder for the solution (Defaults to the
                               CSProj Folder)
  -h, --help                 show this message and exit
